reportMarkdown:
# 调研结论

## 一句话判断
已整理 3 个相邻方向，最接近的是 jez500/pricebuddy（15/100），目前更适合用来找灵感，不适合直接采用。

## 已整理的线索

### 1. jez500/pricebuddy（相邻参考） · ★ 1009 · 更新 2026-07-06
- 关联度：15/100
- 得分原因：公开证据只支持较弱相邻关系；项目定位或使用方式也有差异；该项目可核对线索：A self hostable app that tracks prices and sends you notifications when prices match your preferences。
- 差异部分：主要功能是追踪价格变化和发送降价通知，而非计算最终到手价；需要自行部署（Docker），有一定技术门槛；支持价格历史记录和跨店比较
- 地址：https://github.com/jez500/pricebuddy

### 2. palaciodaniel/discount_calculator（相邻参考） · ★ 0 · 更新 2024-04-03
- 关联度：15/100
- 得分原因：公开证据只支持较弱相邻关系；项目定位或使用方式也有差异；该项目可核对线索：A useful function to automatically apply discounts to prices. I wrote it to practice Unit Testing with pytest.。
- 差异部分：只是一个演示用的Python函数，没有用户界面；需要手动输入价格和折扣，不能从链接读取；功能极其简单，仅用于教学
- 地址：https://github.com/palaciodaniel/discount_calculator

### 3. codertesla/ai-coding-deals（相邻参考） · ★ 52 · 更新 2026-07-08
- 关联度：15/100
- 得分原因：公开证据只支持较弱相邻关系；项目定位或使用方式也有差异；该项目可核对线索：Money-saving guide to AI coding tools: free tiers, discounts, referral credits & open-source alternatives. 省钱指南。。
- 差异部分：是一个信息汇总文档，而非工具；内容是关于AI编程工具的定价和优惠；与电商商品价格计算无关
- 地址：https://github.com/codertesla/ai-coding-deals

## 本次消耗
- LLM Token：输入 35816，输出 4593，合计 40409。

action: README: A cheap listing is useless if it is out of stock. PriceBuddy tracks in stock, pre-order, back order, special order, out of stock and discontinued states. PriceBuddy can calculate price per unit, so a 10-pack and a 3-pack can be compared fairly.
README: PriceBuddy can calculate price per unit, so a 10-pack and a 3-pack can be compared fairly.

README: PriceBuddy can calculate price per unit, so a 10-pack and a 3-pack can be compared fairly. Bring your own OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini or local Ollama provider. PriceBuddy can use AI to recover missing data from a page or help repair scraping rules. It is optional and off by default.
object: README: Track the same product across multiple stores, or multiple listings on the same marketplace, and see the current best option in one place. PriceBuddy records prices over time so you can see highs, lows and trends. That makes it easier to spot fake discounts and decide whether today's price is actually good.
